prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) forged internals upgrade with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1.2mm overbore capacity, supporting 1.5-bar boost on a Garrett GT2860-5 turbocharger with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 58mm compressor inducer

HKS 264°/264° camshafts with 11.5mm lift, paired with Tomei adjustable cam gears and a Supertech valvetrain (titanium retainers, Inconel valves, and dual valve springs) for optimized airflow at 8,500 RPM redline

Custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo utilizing 304 stainless steel, equal-length 4-2-1 headers with 1.75-inch primaries, and a GReddy Revolution RS 70mm cat-back with a straight-through muffler core for minimal backpressure, tuned for 350-400whp on 98 RON fuel
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Evo III-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler extension, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and OEM-style Evo III GSR decals in high-visibility yellow

Volk Racing TE37SL wheels in 17x9 +22 front and 17x10.5 +22 rear, finished in Bronze with Advan Racing lug nuts, mounted on Toyo R888R tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear) for optimal weight distribution and turn-in response

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom spring rates (10kg/mm front, 12kg/mm rear), and spherical bearing top mounts for precise chassis control, paired with Cusco front and rear strut braces and a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar
